briefdescription.para: The start and end property ranges for this impl.
Callback type for page load events.
Callback type for scroll edge reached events.
Callback type for URL changed events.
Callback type for frame rendered events.
Callback type for text found events.
Callback type for geolocation permission requests.
Callback type for web process crashed events.
Current image visual showing the web content.
Last known display area in screen coordinates.
Width of the last uploaded NativeImage texture.
Height of the last uploaded NativeImage texture.
True when the visual must be re-created on next frame.
Mouse events forwarded to web content.
Key events forwarded to web content.
The underlying dali-adaptor web engine instance.
A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference().
Creates a new WebViewImpl with no engine arguments.

simplesect.para: An intrusive pointer to the newly allocated WebViewImpl
The current URL

The user agent string

Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Loads HTML string with override current entry.

simplesect.para: True on success

simplesect.para: True on success

briefdescription.para: Checks if forward navigation is possible.

simplesect.para: True if can go forward

briefdescription.para: Checks if backward navigation is possible.

simplesect.para: True if can go back

The selected text

parameterdescription.para: The callback to receive the plain text

briefdescription.para: Sets whether tiles are cleared when hidden.

parameterdescription.para: True to clear tiles when hidden

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the tile cover area multiplier.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets whether cursor is enabled by client.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable cursor by client

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets whether mouse events are enabled.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether mouse events are enabled.

simplesect.para: True if mouse events are enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether key events are enabled.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether key events are enabled.

simplesect.para: True if key events are enabled

memberdef.argsstring: (bool yDirection, int step, int x, int y)
memberdef.name: FeedMouseWheel

briefdescription.para: Sets whether video hole is enabled.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether video hole is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if video hole is enabled

briefdescription.para: Checks if video is playing asynchronously.

parameterdescription.para: The callback to receive the result

simplesect.para: True if the operation started successfully

briefdescription.para: Emits the GeolocationPermissionSignal and returns the result.
Called after the actor has been initialized.
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.
Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Called by the web engine each time a new frame is ready.

detaileddescription.para: Creates or updates the image visual from the latest NativeImage texture.

briefdescription.para: Called when a position, size, or scale PropertyNotification fires.

detaileddescription.para: Re-calculates the screen display area and forwards it to the web engine.

briefdescription.para: Applies a new display area to the web engine and updates the visual if needed.

parameterdescription.para: The new display rectangle in screen coordinates

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables alpha blending on the web content actor.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable blending (default), false to disable (video hole mode)

briefdescription.para: Wraps a PixelData in an ImageView for use as a favicon or screenshot thumbnail.

simplesect.para: An ImageView showing the pixel data, or an uninitialized handle if pixelData is invalid

briefdescription.para: Converts a Dali::String to a std::string for dali-adaptor interop.

simplesect.para: The corresponding std::string

briefdescription.para: Converts a std::string from dali-adaptor to a Dali::String.

simplesect.para: The corresponding Dali::String

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for WebView.

detaileddescription.para: WebViewImpl wraps the dali-adaptor WebEngine and adapts its interface to the dali-ui conventions: Dali::String instead of std::string, and Dali::Ui::Callback<> instead of std::function.
